headline: The Control Evolution Release - Your Arena, Your Instincts.
author: OM Rajput
releaseNotes: Introduces Arrow Steering as a complete alternative to joystick control, with relative direction input and second-finger boost.
Adds independent Arrow and Joystick settings with live previews, sizing, separation, smoothing, colour and visual feedback controls.
Strengthens touch ownership so steering and boost regions perform their intended actions without cross-triggering.
Introduces an in-client server browser with search, selection and reusable custom server addresses.
Enables natural finger-drag scrolling throughout server lists, Settings and other scrollable interfaces.
Adds long-press clipboard paste support and refines mobile sliders, labels and touch targets.
Improves adaptive launcher-icon composition across Android launchers while preserving the metallic Vlither Enhanced identity.
Preserves the official package, production-signing continuity and user-approved signed update architecture.
Designed, engineered and maintained by OM Rajput.
